name: Clip to Canon Finder
description: Identify short-form moments most likely to turn into fandom artifacts, edits, or memes from clips, transcripts, and reaction data, then output a shortlist with reuse angles.
short_description: Score clips and transcripts for repeatable canon moments.
audience: Short-form editors deciding which moments deserve repeat exposure
Creator teams comparing clips, transcripts, and audience reactions
Founder-led brands turning memorable public moments into grounded callbacks
detail_lines: Scores video links, timestamps, transcripts, subtitles, comments, and editor notes for replay value, quotability, and canon fit.
Exports a shortlist with cut points, reuse angles, thumbnail guidance, and skip rationales for weak or risky moments.
Works only from public or user-authorized material and rejects harmful quote-mining, harassment bait, rumor laundering, and context distortion.
